name_en: Iconic Peekaboo ISeeU Small Bag, hand-stitched with 306 large visible stitches, representing the Selleria classic craftsmanship passed down by FENDI artisans since 1925. Selected Cuoio Romano leather, calfskin with natural grain, tanned without any metal. Lined with calfskin, divided into two exposed interior compartments by a Cuoio Romano leather hard partition, with an interior pocket. Silver Selleria plaque, silver-finished metal fittings. Classic turn-lock on both sides. Bag comes with handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody
